seasonality: Revenue is primarily event-driven by USDT-TRC20 transfer volume surges (emerging-market demand, exchange inflows) rather than consistent seasonal cycles, with periodic spikes tied to broader crypto bull runs.
rationale: Tron generated approximately $2.1B in annualized protocol fees (dominated by USDT-TRC20 bandwidth/energy fees), per DefiLlama fees data as of mid-2025, making it one of the top-3 fee-generating chains. TVL sits near $5.8B per DefiLlama, yielding a P/TVL near ~0.97x at a ~$5.6B market cap; the P/S of ~2.8x is extremely cheap versus Ethereum (~18x) and Solana (~22x), reflecting Tron's mature, low-growth profile and governance/centralization discount. Real staking yield (~4.2% APR net of inflation) is funded by genuine fee revenue rather than pure token emission, giving TRX a credible real-yield narrative.
